words.def: a metal frame or container holding cartridges; can be inserted into an automatic gun
words.zh: n. 修剪, 夾子, 回形針, 剪下來的東西

words.def: a form of entertainment that enacts a story by sound and a sequence of images giving the illusion of continuous movement
words.zh: n. 照片, 圖片, 影片

words.def: either of two fleshy folds of tissue that surround the mouth and play a role in speaking
words.zh: n. 唇, 口緣, 唇狀構造
